chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petitions No.D-42 & 1130 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on CMA 614/24 2.For orders on CMA 7536/23 3.For hearing of CMA 209/23 4.For hearing of main case 15-05-2025 Mr. Kashif Hussain Shaikh, Advocate for petitioner in both matters a/w Shams-ul-Haq Bhutto, authorized person on behalf of petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Zubair Malik, Advocate for respondents-Sindh Education Foundation. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional A.G. **** Counsel for the petitioner in presence of authorized person of the petitioner in both matters, under instructions, does not press the instant petitions and submits that for redressal of his grievance, the petitioner will approach the proper forum. Order accordingly. Office to place a signed copy of this order in captioned connected matter. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
